speeches.name: Michael S. Barr
speeches.summary: Governor Barr supported the FOMC's decision to maintain current monetary policy, emphasizing economic resilience amid shocks, the need for vigilance against inflation persistence, and holding policy steady due to uncertainty.

speeches.name: Susan M. Collins
speeches.summary: President Collins delivered observations on the economic outlook and small businesses at an event hosted by the Springfield Regional Chamber of Commerce.

speeches.name: Jerome H. Powell
speeches.summary: Chair Powell spoke at the FOMC press conference following the meeting where the Committee maintained the federal funds rate target range.

speeches.name: Jerome H. Powell
speeches.summary: Chair Powell provided acceptance remarks, likely related to ongoing Fed policy discussions.

speeches.name: Philip N. Jefferson
speeches.summary: Vice Chair Jefferson spoke on the economic outlook and the labor market at the University of Detroit Mercy.

macro_fred.narrative: Leaning Neutral: CPI at 2.7%, Fed Funds at 3.64%, unemployment at 4.3%.
